route.name: Pine Mountain Observatory Loop
route.description: Public GPX Central Oregon overnighter with dry forest roads, high-desert exposure, and observatory-area camping.

route.bestSeason: Spring to fall, but July needs heat and any wildfire-prevention closure/reroute checks.
